infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Dlavie Chat needs camera access to take photos for messages and stories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Dlavie Chat needs photo library access to share photos in messages.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Dlavie Chat needs microphone access for voice messages.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Dlavie Chat needs location access to share your location in chats.

plugins.photosPermission: Dlavie Chat needs access to your photos to share images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Dlavie Chat needs camera access to take photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Dlavie Chat needs location access to share your location.
